stories.title: Black Chapel Ledger
stories.hook: A cathedral ledger records debts paid in memory instead of money.

stories.title: Crown of Salt
stories.hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide.

stories.title: Dead Channel Protocol
stories.hook: A ghost app predicts outages, deaths, and your next move.

stories.title: Midnight Lockbox
stories.hook: A self-storage unit with no renter sends voice memos predicting what your team will do next.

stories.title: Red Creek Winter
stories.hook: Each snowfall uncovers one body and one impossible alibi.

stories.title: Signal From Kharon-9
stories.hook: Telemetry returns from a decommissioned orbital array and predicts player replies.

stories.title: Static Between Stations
stories.hook: A dead rail line broadcasts private confessions in the players' own voices.

stories.title: Tape 17: Pinewatch
stories.hook: A recovered camcorder tape rewrites itself every midnight.

stories.title: The Fourth Tenant
stories.hook: Rent is collected from an apartment that appears on no official map.

stories.title: The Harvest Men
stories.hook: A ritual mask selects a new wearer every dusk, and refusals vanish overnight.

stories.title: Ward 1908
stories.hook: A closed psychiatric hospital updates patient files every night at 1:08 a.m.
